title: All's Conduct toward Those Who Fought Him on the Day of the Camel
description: All's Conduct toward Those Who Fought Him on the Day of the Camel. Recorded under the year 35 AH (656–657 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 16.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
